scenes.summary: A kind couple living near a forest heartily wish for a child and joyfully welcome their baby girl. Near their cottage, a forbidden garden with shining rapunzel leaves is guarded by an enchantress, Dame Gothel, who claims the baby as her own due to a past theft.
beats: Beat 1: The couple lovingly care for their newborn daughter.
Beat 2: The mysterious garden with glowing rapunzel leaves is shown near their home.
Beat 3: Dame Gothel confronts the father and claims the baby will belong to her.

scenes.summary: Dame Gothel raises Rapunzel in a secluded tower without a door, surrounded by forest. Rapunzel's hair grows long and golden, and she is taught and cared for by Gothel but remains trapped and curious about the outside world.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel grows up in a tall tower with no door, only a high window.
Beat 2: Gothel visits daily, calling Rapunzel to lower her hair to climb up.
Beat 3: Rapunzel sings beautifully, longing to experience the world beyond.

scenes.summary: Prince Adrian hears Rapunzel's enchanting song while riding through the forest and discovers the locked tower. He observes how Gothel climbs the tower using Rapunzel's hair and decides to contact Rapunzel himself by calling from below.
beats: Beat 1: Prince Adrian stops his horse, captivated by Rapunzel's singing.
Beat 2: He watches Gothel climb Rapunzel's hair into the tower through the window.
Beat 3: At night, Adrian calls to Rapunzel and climbs up after she lowers her hair for him.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel and Prince Adrian meet for the first time inside the tower. They share stories about the outside world and start a secret friendship, dreaming of freedom beyond the tower walls.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel gasps as Adrian enters the tower and introduces himself.
Beat 2: They talk about the cruel world and why Rapunzel has been kept inside.
Beat 3: Adrian describes the vibrant world and asks if he may return.

scenes.summary: Prince Adrian visits regularly, growing closer with Rapunzel. Together, they weave a silk rope ladder to escape the tower. Their plan fills Rapunzel with hope for freedom and a new life.
beats: Beat 1: Adrian and Rapunzel laugh and plan songs during visits.
Beat 2: They secretly weave a silk rope ladder to climb down.
Beat 3: Rapunzel expresses her desire to be free, and Adrian promises help.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel accidentally reveals Adrian's name while Gothel is brushing her hair. Enraged, Gothel cuts Rapunzel’s hair short, destroys the rope ladder, and banishes her to a distant desert cottage, severing their escape plan.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel mentions Prince Adrian, causing Gothel’s anger.
Beat 2: Gothel cuts off Rapunzel’s long hair and destroys the ladder.
Beat 3: Gothel abandons Rapunzel in a remote cottage far from the tower.

scenes.summary: Prince Adrian arrives at the tower, calling for Rapunzel. Instead, he confronts Gothel and is pushed off the window ledge, injuring his eyes. Despite his blindness, Adrian persists in searching for Rapunzel.
beats: Beat 1: Adrian calls for Rapunzel and climbs the ladder expecting to meet her.
Beat 2: Gothel appears instead and mocks him.
Beat 3: Adrian falls from the tower and suffers eye injuries but refuses to stop searching.

scenes.summary: In the distant cottage, Rapunzel adapts to her new life, learning self-reliance and forming friendships with local shepherd children. She continues to sing and grows courageous despite her situation.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel tends a garden and helps with chores.
Beat 2: She sings and shares stories with shepherd children.
Beat 3: The children admire her bravery as she adjusts to her new home.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel hears a faint voice calling her name and finds the injured Prince Adrian nearby. They joyfully reunite, and his sight begins to return as their bond rekindles hope and love.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel hears Adrian calling and runs to him.
Beat 2: They embrace and express relief and happiness at reunion.
Beat 3: Adrian’s vision gradually returns as he sees Rapunzel clearly again.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel and Adrian rest in the cottage with help from friends, then prepare to journey to the prince’s kingdom for a new life filled with hope and safety beyond captivity.
beats: Beat 1: They recover with assistance from shepherd families.
Beat 2: Rapunzel and Adrian plan a careful journey to the kingdom.
Beat 3: They begin traveling together, enjoying the open countryside.

scenes.summary: They arrive at the king’s palace where Rapunzel is warmly welcomed. The royal family celebrates her arrival and speaks about true safety beyond physical walls—through love and trust.
beats: Beat 1: Rapunzel and Adrian meet the king and queen with joyful greetings.
Beat 2: The queen assures Rapunzel of her safety in the kingdom.
Beat 3: Rapunzel shares her insight about love and freedom.

scenes.summary: Rapunzel and Adrian marry in a lively celebration filled with music and dancing. Rapunzel sings freely under the open sky, inspiring children with stories of kindness, courage, and true love.
beats: Beat 1: The wedding is celebrated with flowers, music, and dancing children.
Beat 2: Rapunzel sings outside with joy and freedom.
Beat 3: She shares wise stories about bravery and love with children, smiling with Adrian.

characters.name: Rapunzel
characters.description: A brave girl with long golden hair raised in captivity by an enchantress.

characters.name: Prince Adrian
characters.description: A kind prince who seeks Rapunzel after hearing her sing in the forest.

characters.name: Dame Gothel
characters.description: Powerful enchantress who raises Rapunzel in isolation after claiming her.

characters.name: Rapunzel's Mother
characters.description: Kind woman who craved rapunzel leaves during pregnancy.

characters.name: Rapunzel's Father
characters.description: Loving father who stole rapunzel leaves and begged enchantress to spare child.

characters.name: Shepherd children
characters.description: Local kids who befriend Rapunzel at the desert-edge cottage.

characters.name: The King
characters.description: Ruler of the prince's kingdom who welcomes Rapunzel warmly.

characters.name: The Queen
characters.description: Queen of the prince’s kingdom who comforts Rapunzel about safety.

characters.name: Prince Adrian's Guard
characters.description: Attendant who notices and comments on Rapunzel’s singing.
